form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently ran on from midfield; 3rd of 14 at Sha Tin All Weather on April 1 over 1650m, nose behind Loch Tay carrying 52.5kg at $8.60. Before that settled well back; won by a head at this track March 15 over 1400m defeating Just Follow Me carrying 61kg at $7.90. Major player on best form.

form.formComment: Returns from a 49-day let-up. At the latest run 10th of 14 at this track on February 22 over 1400m, 7 len behind Salon S with 54.5kg at $14. form.formComment: Most recently eased back early on 8th of 11 at this track on March 29 over 1400m, 5 len behind Salon S with 55.5kg at $21. Before that ran on from midfield and won by 3 len at this track February 22 over 1400m defeating Yoda's Choice with 59.5kg at $4.70. Will need to improve.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after nine months 8th of 10 at this track on March 22 over 1200m, 4 len behind Circuit Champion carrying 55.5kg at $51. Previously second-up ran on from midfield and won by 4 len at Bendigo Mdn-Sw June 26 over 1300m in heavy going defeating Sacred Fort carrying 57kg at $2.70. Fitter now and is a second-up winner in the past but still hard to get enthused.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of six months. Finished off last preparation to post a big 5.5 len win. Cranbourne Mdn-Sw October 10 over 1300m defeating Mandraki with 59.5kg at $1.75. When resuming last campaign fifth of 12 at Mornington Mdn-Sw September 5 over 1200m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Tagline carrying 59.5kg at $6. See how he returns.
